---
title: "Project demos"
subtitle: Day 27
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-image: ../img/horst_tidydata_5.jpg
  data-background-size: 70%
  data-background-position: right
  data-background-opacity: "0.8"
  data-slide-number: none
format: 
  revealjs:
    incremental: true
    code-copy: true
    code-link: true
    scrollable: true
auto-stretch: false
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

library(countdown)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(palmerpenguins)
library(patchwork)
library(ggthemes)
library(nycflights23)
library(here)
library(httr2)
library(rvest)

slides_theme = theme_minimal(
  base_family = "Atkinson Hyperlegible",
  base_size = 16)

theme_set(slides_theme)
```


## End of Term Reminders: 

- I am almost through with Portfolio 4's that were submitted by Friday. You won't get an automated email but can check gradescope to see if I've done yours
- All portfolio revisions, HW9 submissions, regrade requests etc. must be submitted by 11:59pm on the last day of class 
- Check moodle gradebook for current grades on Lab Quiz 1-3, Portfolio 1-3. Any issues must be brought to me by 11:59 on the last day of class. 
- Final project repos are due on the last day of finals (Monday June 9) at noon. I am presenting at a conference in NYC that morning, so won't be able to help with last-minute issues! 
- Please see final project website description: <https://stat220-s25.github.io/portfolio/final.html> for most up-to-date information
- Keep an eye on your email for a final project group evaluation and course evaluation. If we hit a 90% response rate, everybody gets a little EC on your average lab quiz score! 

## Today's presentation schedule

|           |               |                    |
|-----------|---------------|--------------------|
|           | **Monday**    | **Wednesday**      |
| **10:00** | spotify-group-1    | spotify-au-da-ni |
| **10:10** | data-divas   | jos  |
| **10:20** | board-game-geek | march-madness   |
| **10:30** | rice-county | nyt-new-word  |
| **10:40** | mighty-icy-elephants | mental-health  |
| **10:50** | crc-baseball  |  mystery-project |

## Links

Feedback form: <https://forms.gle/kLzQUE95hoKNwbSy5>

Folder for slides upload: <https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Zv_K2YiOCIeRLQIYSmr4ldIFLZ23IBGg?usp=sharing> 

Draft rubric: <https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1M1K7k6YkfuZNjgJ_lV-ZCAj21ijUXO2Jt5K9rCVjP9I/edit?usp=sharing>
